review_notes: The functions accurately map to Kubernetes security controls related to boundary protection. The naming conventions are mostly followed, but there is room for slight improvement in clarity and consistency. The functions are technically correct and align with the control's intent of dynamic isolation and segregation.
title: Boundary Protection - Boundary protection | dynamic isolation and segregation provide the capability t
step1_reasoning: The control SC-7(20) focuses on boundary protection through dynamic isolation and segregation, which can be effectively mapped to Kubernetes NetworkPolicies and service configurations. NetworkPolicies can enforce ingress and egress restrictions, ensuring that pods are not exposed to the public internet unless explicitly allowed. Additionally, ensuring services are not of type NodePort and enabling TLS for Ingress controllers further strengthens boundary protection by limiting public exposure and securing data in transit.
